properties.title: 4604 Abnaki Trail
properties.summary: Owner residence. Indian Brook PS upgrade corridor, Shawnee II collection system, cancelled Ditch #1322 Phase 2. Zoning dispute resolved Apr 2026.

properties.title: Neff BESS-candidate parcel
properties.summary: Neff willing to site BESS with 1500 ft setback. No recorded option/purchase as of 2026-04-15.

properties.title: Indian Brook Pump Station
properties.summary: Three-phase power upgrade (Res #974-25, Dec 2025). Original 2007 single-phase duplex, 8" FM. Feeds Shawnee II WWTP.

properties.title: Shawnee II WWTP
properties.summary: Phase 2 expansion: 2.0 → 3.0 MGD avg / 12.6 MGD peak. ~$23M OWDA-funded. Under construction Apr 2024 → early 2027. NPDES OH0023850.

properties.title: American Bath WWTP
properties.summary: BOSC FM-1 receiver (split). 1.5 MGD design. No pretreatment program. NPDES OH0023841. Under 1996 federal consent decree.

properties.title: American II WWTP
properties.summary: BOSC FM-1 receiver (remainder). 1.2 MGD design. No pretreatment program. NPDES OH0037338.

properties.title: Amazon WOH4 (logistics)
properties.summary: Amazon.com Services LLC — 26 ac logistics site. Port Authority deed $860k, Nov 2025. Jay Begg Pkwy, Shawnee Twp Sec 13.

properties.title: AEP Lyka 345kV Substation (proposed)
properties.summary: New 345kV substation on BOSC site + ~4 mi 345kV line. OPSB approval required. Community meeting 2026-05-06.

properties.title: FM-2 terminus (Lima 78" sewer)
properties.summary: BOSC FM-2 (16", 17,900 LF) terminates at City of Lima 78" gravity sewer @ Woodward Ave & Grand Ave.

properties.title: BOSC FM-1 (10"→8", 20,100 LF)
properties.summary: FM-1 splits flow: 10" to American Bath WWTP, steps down to 8" continuing to American II WWTP. County revenue-capture portion. Domestic-equivalent flow only (no pretreatment program at either plant). Aligned to existing 12-16" water mains.

properties.title: BOSC FM-2 (16", 17,900 LF)
properties.summary: FM-2 carries bulk of BOSC 2.5 MGD industrial discharge to City of Lima 78" gravity sewer @ Woodward & Grand. Lima has pretreatment program. 16" diameter = hydraulically dominant over FM-1. Follows existing 16" Cole St trunk main.

properties.title: Theorized FM-3 to Shawnee II (unconfirmed)
properties.summary: Theorized third forcemain from BOSC site westward to Shawnee II WWTP. No existing large mains (>=12") run W from BOSC — this would be NEW construction, likely following Ditch #1322 corridor / platted drainage easement at rear of Indian Brook Estates. Would explain: (1) Shawnee II 3x peak expansion far exceeding residential demand, (2) Indian Brook PS three-phase upgrade, (3) WPCLF loan for Shawnee Twp wastewater. ~8 km.

properties.title: Indian Brook PS → Shawnee II (existing 8" FM)
properties.summary: Existing 8" forcemain from Indian Brook PS to Shawnee II WWTP (2007 as-built). Candidate for upsizing if throughput increases from PS three-phase upgrade. Adjacent 16" water main on Spencerville Rd corridor at ~-84.169.
